2024-04-03T10:14:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services from Hong Kong West Kowloon to Xiamen and Chaoshan Stations will be delayed due to bad weather conditions. 

Trains affected:
To Xiamen: G3006
To Chaoshan: G6386

MTR is working with the Mainland and more details will be provided as soon as possible. 

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or click the “車站大屏” (only available on Chinese version) on the mobile app , HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T10:14:00.CONTENT_CN:
內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣影響，部分由香港西九龍站前往廈門和潮汕站的高速鐵路列車服務將會延遲。

受影響車次:
前往廈門:G3006
前往潮汕:G6386

港鐵正向內地了解情況，會儘快提供進一步消息。

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)或如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁或手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

2024-04-03T12:26:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Xiamen have been cancelled due to train regulation. Cancelled train services: From Xiamen: G3005 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5612 For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app, HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. You may consider travel on the East Rail Line trains to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Mainland. Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T12:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於車務調動，部分來往香港西九龍站及廈門的高速鐵路列車車次取消。 已取消的車次: 由廈門出發:G3005 由香港西九龍站出發:G5612 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)或如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁或手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲，或使用其他跨境交通工具前往內地。 如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Some High Speed Rail have been cancelled
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高鐵部分列車車次取消

2024-04-03T12:37:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Xiamen have been cancelled due to train regulation. Cancelled train services: From Xiamen: G3005 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5612 For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app (link), HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. You may consider travel on the East Rail Line trains to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Mainland. Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T12:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於車務調動，部分來往香港西九龍站及廈門的高速鐵路列車車次取消。 已取消的車次: 由廈門出發:G3005 由香港西九龍站出發:G5612 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)或如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁或手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 您可考慮乘搭東鐵綫經羅湖/落馬洲，或使用其他跨境交通工具前往內地。 如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2024-04-03T14:13:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services from Hong Kong West Kowloon to Xiamen, Chaoshan, Shantou and Fuzhou Stations will be delayed due to bad weather conditions. Trains affected: To Xiamen: G3004 / G3006 To Chaoshan: G6384 / G6388 To Shantou: G6392 To Fuzhou: G3002 MTR are working with the Mainland and more details will be provided as soon as possible. description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: TD appeals to cross boundary travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲過境旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival tomorrow (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). The Transport Department appeals to these travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand.
2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料由明天清明節假期(4月4日)起至星期日(4月7日)將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸往返內地。運輸署呼籲相關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。

2024-04-04T14:57:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival today (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). –青嶼幹線(青馬大橋)(往九龍方向)。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Individual train service has been cancelled

2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail train G5614 travelling from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei has been cancelled due to train service regulations. Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) and app or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於車務調度，由香港西九龍站前往深圳北的高速鐵路列車車次G5614取消。 您可在30天內於12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，或到香港西九龍站辦理退票。

2024-04-03T22:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，荃灣路(往屯門方向)近荔景邨的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-04T02:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因緊急維修而封閉的荃灣路(往屯門方向)近荔景邨的慢線現已解封。

2024-04-04T08:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to rail defect near Tsim Sha Tsui Station, Tsuen Wan Line trains will operate at a slower speed from Jordan Station to Tsim Sha Tsui Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station by 15-20 minutes.
2024-04-04T08:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於尖沙咀站附近的路軌出現故障，荃灣綫列車駛經佐敦站至尖沙咀站路段時需要慢駛，荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的行車時間預計需要額外15-20分鐘。

2024-04-04T11:37:00.CONTENT_EN:
The temporary repair work on the rail defect near Tsim Sha Tsui Station this morning has been finished. However, Tsuen Wan Line trains is still operating at a slower speed from Jordan Station to Tsim Sha Tsui Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station by 3-5 minutes throughout the operating hours today. Please click on the "Alternative Transport Information" below to search for other routes. Longer waiting times on Tsuen Wan Line platforms can be expected. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-04-04T11:37:00.CONTENT_CN:
今早尖沙咀站附近路軌故障已經臨時復修。 荃灣綫列車駛經佐敦站至尖沙咀站路段時仍需要慢駛，預計今日荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的整體行車時間需要額外3-5分鐘。 請按以下「其他交通工具資料」連結搜尋替代路綫。 現時荃灣綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-04-05T01:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Tsuen Wan Line train service has already ended for today. Repair work will continue overnight. Tomorrow’s train service arrangements will be announced later based on the progress of work. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
2024-04-05T01:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 今天的荃灣綫服務已經完結。港鐵職員會繼續於非行車時段進行復修。 我們會視乎復修進度盡快通知大家早上的列車服務安排。 感謝您的體諒。
